shot_type_and_framing: medium shot centered on the soap dispenser and holder, placed slightly left of center within the vertical frame
camera_movement: slow lateral track from left to right
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame lens feel with a moderate focal length around 50mm, shallow depth of field focusing on the soap dispenser and holder, softly blurring the background
environment_description: a beige stone bathroom countertop with a rectangular mirror mounted on the wall, a small potted plant on the left, and a rolled white towel on the right
subject_description: a matte beige ceramic soap dispenser with a shiny silver pump and a matching toothbrush holder, both featuring a delicate cut-out pattern, sitting on a matching ceramic tray
motion_behavior: natural and steady, the camera movement is smooth and realistic, maintaining focus on the ceramic objects
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, premium, and filmic with soft natural tones and minimalistic elegance
